page_title: Neon Genesis Evangelion Screen Saver Vol.3
text:
is a software developed and released by GAINAX.

It's the third installment in the highly popular Evangelion Screensaver series! This disc contains thirty screensavers, with everything from cute deformed characters running around, to elegant screensavers using popular illustrations. Altogether, they will bring Evangelion to your desktop! http://web.archive.org/web/20050320055040/http://www.gainax.co.jp/soft/evass3/index-e.html
